segments.speaker: 题目4/5
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. Hi Maya. Since today's your first day with us at the health center, I'll be training you. Have you ever worked as a receptionist before? Yeah, I had a similar job at the campus health center at my old university, but only on the weekends. Great. Okay. So we have this checklist here of items we have to go through. It's rather comprehensive, and we won't get to everything today. It's just been updated, so it should be pretty easy to use. I am eager to get started.
